targets.query:
from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "snapshot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "latitude" or r["_field"] == "longitude")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(set: ${selected_vin:json}, value: r["vin"]))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "snapshot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "tachographSpeed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(set: ${selected_vin:json}, value: r["vin"]))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "vin"])
  |> group(columns: ["vin"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "snapshot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "fuelLevel1" or r._field == "fuelLevel2" or r["_field"] == "catalystFuelLevel")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(set: ${selected_vin:json}, value: r["vin"]))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field", "vin"])
  |> group(columns: ["vin", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "snapshot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "engineSpeed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(set: ${selected_vin:json}, value: r["vin"]))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "vin"])
  |> group(columns: ["vin"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "demo")

  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "snapshot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "parkingBrakeSwitch")

  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "snapshot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "driver1WorkingState" or r["_field"] == "driver2WorkingState")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(set: ${selected_vin:json}, value: r["vin"]))
  |> keep(columns: ["vin", "_value", "_time", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["vin", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "header")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hrTotalVehicleDistance")

  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

panels.description: Aggregated stats written by the fleet analysis backend.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "fleet_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "vehicleCount" or r["_field"] == "headerCount" or r["_field"] == "snapshotCount" or r["_field"] == "totalCount")
  |> last()

panels.title: Fleet Stats

targets.query:
from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "snapshot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "directionIndicatorLeft")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(set: ${selected_vin:json}, value: r["vin"]))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "vin"])
  |> group(columns: ["vin"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "snapshot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "directionIndicatorRight")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(set: ${selected_vin:json}, value: r["vin"]))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "vin"])
  |> group(columns: ["vin"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "snapshot")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "brakeLightStatus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(set: ${selected_vin:json}, value: r["vin"]))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value == "INACTIVE" then 0.0 else if r._value == "ACTIVE" then 1.0 else if r._value == "ADAPTIVE" then 2.0 else -1.0 }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "vin"])
  |> group(columns: ["vin"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "header")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "driver1Id")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(set: ${selected_vin:json}, value: r["vin"]))
  |> group(columns: ["vin"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "vin", "_value"])
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "demo")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "header")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "driver1Id")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(set: ${selected_vin:json}, value: r["vin"]))
  |> group(columns: ["vin"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "vin", "_value"])
  |> yield(name: "history")
